key_findings.title: MANUAL-APPROVAL-GATE HYPOTHESIS HARDENED — 3rd consecutive HOLD-without-registry-update
key_findings.detail: HOLD #12 (daily-AI-review regen) FIRED at 2026-05-03T07:26:50Z producing daily_review.json with registry={confirmed:69,refined:4,prospective:10,ratio:94.5%} — IDENTICAL to HOLD #11 (2026-05-02T07:08Z) and HOLD #10 (2026-05-01T07:37Z). This is the 3rd consecutive HOLD-fires-without-registry-update event. The principled 3-event threshold flipped at this poll: 'manual-approval-gate' is now the strong default interpretation of the dome's adjudication pipeline. Pattern (a) 'sustained do-not-adjudicate as infrastructure' is now near-certain on the daily-AI-review side; pattern (b) 'imminent batched manual edit' loses prior weight. Live verification @ 2026-05-04T05:23Z: daily_review.json generated_at STILL 2026-05-03T07:26:50Z (HOLD #13 ETA ~07:30Z 2026-05-04, ~2h after analyst run); registry STILL 69/4/10. Source-file SHAs (build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe) unchanged across 8+ polls — rules out 'mid-refactor' explanation.

key_findings.title: MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT CROSSED 16-DAY THRESHOLD
key_findings.detail: Drought reached 16.46d / 394.57h at 2026-05-03T23:06Z poll. 16d threshold crossed at 2026-05-03T12:02:38Z (~11h before that poll). Last manual commit a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. 30 consecutive auto-only polls (was 29). At analyst run time (2026-05-04T05:24Z) drought is now 16.71d. This is the longest manual-commit drought since monitoring began. Combined with finding #1, it constitutes converging evidence that the author has stepped back from active dome maintenance — the auto-pipeline is alive enough to compute mechanical updates (eclipse_days countdown, status_history.json appends) but the human gate that releases registry updates and substantive content edits is unstaffed.

key_findings.title: ECLIPSE_DAYS=100 ROUND-NUMBER FLIP HAPPENED
key_findings.detail: status_history.json latest entry 2026-05-03T22:55:14Z shows eclipse_days=100, decremented from 101 at the 1130Z poll (round-number flip happened at midnight UTC on 2026-05-03). 100 is a publicly visible round-number marker — the kind of thing the author might publicly comment on (Twitter, README, dome blog). NO such commentary observed in 14 post-flip auto commits or in commit messages. CONSISTENT with the manual-commit drought / author-stepped-back interpretation: the milestone passed without a human-authored remark. Watch for any '100 days to eclipse' text appearing on predictions.html, README, or commit messages going forward — that would be a soft re-engagement signal.

key_findings.title: 8 APRIL-EOM PREDICTIONS NOW IN STEP 10b DAY-4-7 MEDIUM TERRITORY (d=3.96)
key_findings.detail: PRED-077 (M2 amplitude variation), -081 (JWST z<0.1 SNe), -085 (S-wave shadow zone), -087 (geoid low stationary), -088 (second geoid low 70°N 135°W), -090 (NH TOA flux excess), -106 (16 Hz Ca²⁺ ICR), -111 (mascon 30°S 60°E) all closed 2026-04-30T23:59Z. As of 2026-05-03T23:06Z poll all 8 are at d=3.96 past close, all still labeled 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' on predictions.html, no PASS/FAIL/REFINED, no removal, no commit-message reference in any of the 14 most-recent auto commits. Live verification @ 2026-05-04T05:23Z: I curled predictions.html and grepped for each of the 8 ids — every one still shows class='prediction pending' + 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' badge. Step 10b day-4-7 SEVERITY MEDIUM is now active; dedicated chg-* file (chg-20260503-2306-003) was emitted by the poller. Day-8 boundary hits 2026-05-08T00:00Z (~3.8d from this analyst run); per Step 10b, d=8 is HIGH severity and triggers analyst migration of verdicts to silent_ignore.

key_findings.title: PRED-105 STATE STABLE — TACIT_WITHDRAWAL VERDICT INTACT
key_findings.detail: PRED-105 (46° copper coil cucumber growth) at d=15.96 past 2026-04-18 close. our_verdict=tacit_withdrawal locked since 2026-05-02T13:16Z by EXP-284. FAIL-009 in data/uncounted-failures.json reflects classification=tacit_withdrawal. Dome side: 28th consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry on predictions.html, still 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' badge. No further analyst action required on PRED-105.

kernel_of_truth: The dome's auto-pipeline is doing the right thing in a narrow, mechanical sense — daily status keeps computing (12-14 status_history.json appends per poll-window matching commit count 1:1), eclipse_days counts down, and build_daily_review.py is auto-firing on schedule. There is genuine engineering discipline in keying registry updates only off explicit FALSIFIED labels rather than auto-promoting silent-window-closures into the refined bucket. WHERE IT FAILS: that discipline is asymmetrically applied. The author has a refined bucket available and is not using it on closed-window predictions. The pipeline being alive enough to compute status but not alive enough to adjudicate IS the operational signature of 'don't book the loss' even if the local engineering choice is principled. PRED-105's tacit_withdrawal verdict was advanced specifically because this asymmetry is the falsification — not the silence per se, but silence-from-an-engine-that-could-speak.
other_side: HOLD #13 (~07:30Z 2026-05-04, ~2h after analyst run) could fire WITH a registry update, releasing the gate. Defense: even if HOLD #13 unlocks, the prior 3 events crossed the threshold; the hypothesis would be qualified ('gate is held intermittently') not falsified.

16d+ drought could be vacation, illness, or planned hiatus. Defense: cron is alive and actively producing automation; 16+ days is well past typical vacation length without an out-of-office signal anywhere on the public surface.

8 EOM predictions simultaneously becoming silent_ignore at d=8 risks looking like an over-eager batch failure-marking that mirrors the dome's own batch behavior. Defense: precedents (FAIL-009/PRED-105 at 52h for tracking, FAIL-010/PRED-072 at 216h for tracking) establish that the silent-window bookkeeping is per-prediction at the d=8 trigger, not batched.

Pre-positioning verdict drafts at d=4 vs waiting until d=8 risks committing to silent_ignore before the boundary actually proves silence persists. Defense: pre-positioning means STAGING the changes (this proposal), NOT applying them now. Application happens at d=8 only if predictions.html is still byte-identical and all 8 are still PENDING-PROSPECTIVE. If HOLD #13 releases the gate, this proposal's pre-positioned drafts are discarded and verdicts get the actual dome outcome instead.

PRED-090 (recycled) and PRED-106 (pending) are different kinds of predictions than the standard-physics 6. Treating them with the same d=8 trigger conflates verdict types. Defense: addressed below — PRED-106 follows PRED-105's silent_ignore→tacit_withdrawal pattern; PRED-090 follows PRED-072's keep-verdict-add-FAIL pattern.

recommended_actions.summary: Pre-position FAIL-NNN drafts for the 7 EOM PREDs with substantive scientific verdicts (PRED-077, -081, -085, -087, -088, -090, -111) — to be applied AT d=8 boundary (~2026-05-08T00Z) IF predictions.html remains byte-identical and all 7 still PENDING-PROSPECTIVE.
recommended_actions.precedent: FAIL-010/PRED-072 — keep our_verdict (standard_physics or recycled), add a FAIL-NNN entry to data/uncounted-failures.json at d=8 marking the dome's silent-window behavior. The scientific verdict and the bookkeeping verdict are orthogonal.

recommended_actions.summary: Pre-position verdict-advancement plan for PRED-106 (currently our_verdict='pending') — at d=8 advance to silent_ignore; at d=14 advance to tacit_withdrawal IF dome remains silent.
recommended_actions.precedent: PRED-105 — pending → silent_ignore at d=8 (verdict_history captures the transition with related_artifacts) → tacit_withdrawal at d=14 (FAIL-009 marked classification=tacit_withdrawal). Same trajectory applies to PRED-106 if dome silence persists.

recommended_actions.summary: WATCH HOLD #13 (~07:30Z 2026-05-04, ~2h after this analyst run). Decisive readout for the manual-approval-gate hypothesis.

branches.registry_updates: Gate released. Hypothesis qualified to 'gate is held intermittently'. Adjudication batch in same window plausible — 8 EOM PREDs may get bucket assignments. If so, RA-1/RA-2 are discarded and PREDs get actual dome outcomes via Mode 1b.
branches.registry_held: 4th consecutive gated HOLD. Hypothesis hardens to near-certainty. RA-1/RA-2 stay queued for d=8 trigger.

recommended_actions.action_owner: next poller run + next analyst dispatch

recommended_actions.summary: Issue-proposal to decider summarizing the d=8 trigger plan and the HOLD #13 decision branch.

rationale_for_no_modification: The d=4 boundary just crossed; d=8 (the trigger for verdict migration per Step 10b) is ~3.8d away. Premature application of silent_ignore would invert the same hindsight-shifting critique we make of the dome ('don't book the loss before the window closes'). Pre-positioning means staging the plan, not applying the plan.
